The '''Pelemaxians''' were a social group<ref name="COTG">''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]''</ref> that originated in<ref name="Planetnamia" /> the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies']] [[Pelemax system/Legends|Pelemax system]].<ref name="TEA" /> Generations before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the Pelemaxians tamed the [[Jungle/Legends|jungle]] creatures known as the [[Tentacle bird of Pelemax|tentacle birds of Pelemax]] as war mounts, capitalizing on their savage call, which could scare and confuse enemy [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the Galactic Civil War, the Pelemaxians had begun using the [[Bird/Legends|birds]] as caravan animals as well as a mode of personal transportation. The Pelemaxians also sold the tentacle birds of Pelemax offworld; such exports made up a major part of the local economy.<ref name="COTG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Pelemaxians were introduced in ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', a [[1994]] sourcebook published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The respective entry was written by [[Rick D. Stuart]] based on an illustration of a tentacle bird of Pelemax by [[David Plunkett]].<ref name="COTG" />
